subject: Sports
title: Leicester City's Miracle Season
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Leicester City's Miracle Season.

hook.text: A team that nearly got relegated won the league the next season. The odds? Five thousand to one.

buildup.text: Leicester City had no world-class players and a modest budget in 2015-16.

discovery.text: Manager Claudio Ranieri united the squad. Jamie Vardy and Riyad Mahrez played out of their skins.

twist.text: Bookmakers gave them the same odds of winning as finding the Loch Ness Monster. They won anyway.

climax.text: The title was confirmed when their rivals dropped points. The players watched together at Vardy's house.

punchline.text: 5000-to-1 odds. The greatest underdog story sport has ever seen.

quiz.question: What were Leicester City's odds of winning the Premier League in 2015-16?
